{{Infobox concept
| name = Unsouled
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Unsouled Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|An Unsouled is an individual characterized by a lack of a soul or a destroyed core, a condition often viewed as a crippling deformity. Because they cannot practice the [[sacred arts]], Unsouled individuals are unable to engage in combat or travel effectively. This status carries significant social stigma; they are often treated with contempt, viewed as having no honor, and may be excluded from family [[life]] or social circles. In certain regions like [[Sacred Valley]], they are provided basic comforts by their clans but are otherwise marginalized and seen as having no future. Despite these limitations, an Unsouled may still possess the ability to use basic [[madra]] or power a script. The term is also used metaphorically to describe a sense of absolute emptiness or the death of the spirit.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The term Unsouled describes an individual who lacks any affinity to their spirit and possesses no [[madra]]. Within the hierarchy of practitioners, being Unsouled is a rank or type held by [[Lindon]], representing someone who has started two steps behind others. At the [[Foundation stage]], this status functions as a specific level of power that prevents an individual from practicing [[sacred arts]]. Due to the nature of this condition, Unsouled individuals are not allowed to marry or have families to prevent passing on their deformity. Despite these limitations, an Unsouled can still rise in power by utilizing the resources of a prestigious school of [[sacred arts]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Unsouled]] is a term used to describe an individual who has no affinity to their spirit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1">''Unsouled'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|An [[Unsouled]] at the [[Foundation stage]] is a level of power.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|An [[Unsouled]] cannot practice [[sacred arts]] and may never have a family of his own to avoid passing on their deformity.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The term [[Unsouled]] is used by Keth to address [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Unsouled]] refers to those who lack [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Unsouled]] are not allowed to marry.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|An [[Unsouled]] is a rank or type of practitioner that [[Lindon]] holds.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|An [[Unsouled]] can rise using the resources of a prestigious school of [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Unsouled]] is a term used to describe someone who started two steps behind.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|No one is [[Unsouled]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|An [[Unsouled]] is a status or stage of being.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Unsouled]] is a status or classification within the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The bowl test is used to designate someone as [[Unsouled]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is an [[Unsouled]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Unsouled]] is a status or classification that [[Kelsa]]'s clan elders used to blame [[Lindon]] for.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1">''Uncrowned'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|In [[Sacred Valley]], the word for '[[Empty]]' is '[[Unsouled]]'.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|An [[Unsouled]] can wear a badge made from [[wintersteel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Unsouled]] is a symbol in the old language.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Unsouled]] is a title used to address [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elders]] tend not to meet with [[Unsouled]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Unsouled]] is a state or identity [[Lindon]] once held.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Unsouled]] are destined to be crushed beneath the [[Dreadgod]]'s feet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] feels powerless like an [[Unsouled]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Wei Jin Sairus]] addresses [[Lindon]] as [[Unsouled]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] warns that anyone who calls him '[[Unsouled]]' dies.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“There is no affinity to his spirit,” the First Elder says at last, and those close enough to hear gasp. “He is empty. Unsouled.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Stand where you are, Unsouled!” Keth roared, and the shout was driven with all the force of his madra and fury.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Unsouled?” She shrugged. “Never heard that word before coming here. You just started two steps behind, that’s the spine of it.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Wei Jin Sairus looked up and frowned at Lindon, “How did you make your way back here, Unsouled?”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
